_comment: Reference-parity test matrix. Each entry: HF model name + local GGUF + prompts.

tests.name: qwen3.5_4b_hybrid
tests._note: Hybrid DeltaNet+self-attn. HF ref too big for 16 GB (80B). Use BF16 fallback or pick a smaller DeltaNet-class model. Currently DISABLED — kept for documentation.

tests._note: Standard transformer baseline. Requires HF token for gated model.
